    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)

    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return {'type': 'graph', 'data': graph_json, 'updated_graph': graph_json}

results.Query: Add new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_92 to ju1.a2.m4. List direct child nodes of ju1.a2.m4 in the updated graph. Return a list of child nodes name.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-3, add-list
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    new_node_name = 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_92'
    graph_copy.add_node(new_node_name, type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH'])
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a2.m4', new_node_name, type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    children = []
    for neighbor in graph_copy.successors('ju1.a2.m4'):
        edge_data = graph_copy['ju1.a2.m4'][neighbor]
        if 'RK_CONTAINS' in edge_data['type']:
            children.append(neighbor)
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'list',
        'data': children,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object
